title: calea longipedicellata
intro: Calea longipedicellata is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as a type of daisy, found in Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Calea longipedicellata include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and other stress-related disorders, as well as potential anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. Herbal preparations of Calea longipedicellata are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
